artifacts.summary: Analysis of 3 coverage sorries in ClosedFlagIntBFMCS bridge pattern; proposes direct multi-family construction where families = discreteClosedMCS members, eliminating modal coverage sorries while F/P sorries remain as documented blockers

partial_progress.details: Analyzed root causes of 3 sorries, proposed architectural refactoring

sorry_analysis.sorry_1_modal_backward: Coverage gap - families don't cover all discreteClosedMCS at time t
sorry_analysis.sorry_2_modal_forward: Cross-family transfer - T-axiom only gives same-family result
sorry_analysis.sorry_3_chain_membership: Lindenbaum extension doesn't stay in closed set

key_findings.root_cause: Bridge pattern constructs chains independently of discreteClosedMCS, then asserts membership
key_findings.solution: Direct construction where families indexed by discreteClosedMCS members
key_findings.remaining_reason: Dovetailing gap - orthogonal to modal coverage
